title: rondeletia neriifolia subsp. calcicola
intro: Rondeletia neriifolia subsp. calcicola is a rare and endemic subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Cuba. This plant has been reported to possess medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rondeletia neriifolia subsp. calcicola are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin infections.
